description: Canonical category taxonomy for ClaudeMax agents and skills. Adding a new top-level category requires a PR that updates this file. Subcategories are free-form folder names nested under a category and do not need to be registered here.

categories.title: Software Engineering
categories.summary: General software craftsmanship: code review, refactoring, testing, debugging, architecture, performance.

categories.title: Languages & Runtimes
categories.summary: Per-language role teams (developer, architect, security-reviewer, sdet, …) organized in agents/languages/<lang>/ and composing a language capability skill.

categories.title: Web Development
categories.summary: Frontend, backend, and full-stack web engineering and frameworks.

categories.title: Mobile
categories.summary: iOS, Android, and cross-platform mobile development.

categories.title: Data & Analytics
categories.summary: Data engineering, SQL, pipelines, warehousing, analytics, visualization.

categories.title: AI & Machine Learning
categories.summary: ML modeling, MLOps, prompt engineering, LLM application development.

categories.title: DevOps & Infrastructure
categories.summary: CI/CD, containers, orchestration, IaC, cloud platforms, observability.

categories.title: Security
categories.summary: Application security, auditing, threat modeling, and authorized offensive testing.

categories.title: Quality Assurance
categories.summary: Test strategy, automation, exploratory testing, and release verification.

categories.title: Product & Design
categories.summary: Product management, UX, design systems, user research.

categories.title: Content & Documentation
categories.summary: Technical writing, documentation, editing, marketing copy.

categories.title: Business & Operations
categories.summary: Finance, legal review, operations, project management, analytics.

categories.title: Research & Analysis
categories.summary: Literature review, competitive analysis, fact-checking, synthesis.

categories.title: Creative
categories.summary: Storytelling, naming, brainstorming, and other open-ended generative work.

categories.title: Domain Specialists
categories.summary: Vertical / industry experts (healthcare, legal, finance, gaming, etc.) that do not fit a horizontal category.

categories.title: Meta
categories.summary: Agents and skills that build, evaluate, or maintain other agents and skills in this repo.
